name: ECB Deposit Facility Rate
notes: T2 fallback for FRED ECBDFR (frozen 2025-06-13). ECB Data Portal direct via SDMX 2.1; FM dataset key 'D.U2.EUR.4F.KR.DFR.LEV' (Daily / Euro area / EUR / Financial market data / Key interest rate / Deposit Facility Rate / level). T1 candidates via DB.nomics ECB-mirror were stale at 2025-02; only T2 direct gives fresh values. Wired §3.1 Stage D.2 2026-04-30.

name: Euro Area AAA 2Y Govt Yield (ECB YC)
notes: Closes the DE 2Y gap noted in §3.1.7 Outstanding Calculated Fields (needed for Global yield curve composite + EZ 10Y-2Y slope). ECB YC dataset spot rate; AAA-rated euro-area sovereigns ≈ DE bund. Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: Euro Area AAA 30Y Govt Yield (ECB YC)
notes: Long-end of euro area sovereign curve; complements EZ_GOVT_2Y for term-structure analysis. ECB YC dataset spot rate; AAA-rated euro-area sovereigns. Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: ECB Composite Indicator of Systemic Stress (CISS)
notes: ECB CISS euro-area systemic-stress composite; free EZ substitute for GS/Bloomberg FCI and the Chicago Fed NFCI analogue (regime-aa coverage map, FC pillar). Verified live via ECB Data Portal SDMX 2026-06-15.

name: ECB CES Inflation Expectations 12M Ahead (median)
notes: ECB Consumer Expectations Survey — euro-area (Z18) headline 12-month-ahead inflation expectations, weighted median. Free EZ analogue of UMich consumer inflation expectations; 3-year-ahead horizon also available in CES. Verified live 2026-06-15 (4.0% @ 2026-04).

name: Eurozone M3 Money Supply (YoY)
notes: ECB BSI — euro-area Monetary aggregate M3, annual growth rate (key M.U2.Y.V.M30.X.I.U2.2300.Z01.A; ECB TITLE 'Monetary aggregate M3, Annual growth rate', UNIT PCCH, working-day + seasonally adjusted). Replaces frozen FRED OECD-MEI mirror MABMM301EZM189S (a stock LEVEL mislabelled "Percent Change YoY", froze 2023-11) — see manuals/2026-06-17-m2-units-trio-recommendation.md. Keyless SDMX; history from 1981-01 so it wins the freshness merge for the full EZ_M3 column. Verified live 2026-06-17 (2.74% @ 2026-04).
